description.ko: 유기적 프랙탈 기하학이 영원한 봄 속에서 첨단 광섬유 회로와 결합하는 사이버네틱 생태계.
description.en: A cybernetic ecosystem where organic fractal geometry merges with advanced fiber-optic circuitry in an eternal spring.

prompt: A hyper-realistic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Fiber-Optic Bloom.' A futuristic botanical organism featuring translucent #FFB6C1 pink petals with embedded #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry and #89CFF0 sky blue fiber-optic veins. Rooted in #4A0E4E plum soil of crushed data shards, shimmering digital pollen floats like glowing pixels. Macro photography, Unreal Engine 5, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution.
